name: Jetbest Corporation
summary: Jetbest Corporation researches and develops, manufactures, and sells inkjet printing products in Taiwan. The company offers various inks, such as UV inks; and wide format inks, including eco solvent pigments, mild solvent pigments, water dyes and pigments, oil-based dyes and pigments. It also provides textile inks comprising dye sublimation and disperse inks, resin pigments, and reactive dyes; magic inks; desktop inks; nano and resin-free colorants; and bulk systems consisting of refilled cartridges. The company also distributes its products approximately in 80 countries. Jetbest Corporation was founded in 2004 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
